description: Even minimal briefs must have title, summary, rationale, and at least one tag.

output.title: Seed funding for mangrove monitoring network
output.summary: A coastal resilience fund is accepting proposals for community-led monitoring systems.
output.whyItMatters: The coop already has field data from last season's mangrove survey — this builds on existing work.
output.suggestedNextStep: Check eligibility criteria and confirm the application deadline.
